issue_title: Fix bug where active Period might never be known
issue_body_preview:
While testing for an upcoming release, we found a bug where an application wasn't able to tell which period was currently-played and thus wasn't able to show the audio and text track list for the current Period to its user.

Turns out that the issue at its base, is due to my poor comprehension of
test_description_zh: 在播放器中播放包含多个 Period 的多时段内容（如 DASH 多 Period 流），观察播放过程中是否能正确获取当前正在播放的 Period 信息，并验证应用是否能据此展示当前 Period 对应的音轨和字幕轨道列表。
expected_result_zh: 播放器在播放多 Period 内容时，应用能够正确识别当前正在播放的 Period，并能正常展示该 Period 对应的音频轨道列表和文本（字幕）轨道列表供用户选择。
